name: EvaluationResponse
description: A map of flag keys to variant objects representing the evaluated variant assignments for the user.

key.description: The variant key identifying this variant.

payload.description: An optional JSON payload associated with the variant.

experimentKey.description: The key of the experiment that assigned this variant.

flagType.description: The type of flag, such as experiment or release.

flagVersion.description: The version of the flag configuration.

default.description: Whether this is the default variant.
